text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she doesn't win, Satono Diamond is
able to dedicate her complete attention to her
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She feels lighter than she ever has before in both
body and soul.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, she has overcome her jinx. Free from
the burden that has plagued her for so long,
Satono Diamond sheds tears of relief.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black approaches her after the race. She
suggests they both run at the Arima Kinen, and
Satono Diamond accepts the challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They promise to have an incredible race at the
Arima Kinen.
